info.description: gomo6 — open social platform API. Create bots, integrations, and apps.
info.title: gomo6 API

post.description: Generate a new TOTP secret and provisioning URI for 2FA setup

get.description: Returns whether 2FA is enabled and if there is a pending setup

post.description: Verify the TOTP code and enable 2FA for the authenticated user
Authenticate with username and password. Returns tokens or partial token if 2FA is enabled.
Blacklist access token and revoke all refresh tokens

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new token pair
Create a new account with username, password, and optional email
Validate a TOTP code during login (requires partial token)

get.description: Get a list of boards with optional filters
Get a board by its slug
Get all invites for a board (owner only)

post.description: Create an invite link for a private gomosub (owner only)

get.description: List all OAuth applications owned by the authenticated user
Get an OAuth application by ID

post.description: Regenerate the client secret for an OAuth application

get.description: List available drops purchase packages
List all available gifts in the catalog

post.description: Send a gift to another user (deducts drops)

get.description: Get information about an invite (public, no auth required)

post.description: Accept an invite and join the gomosub

get.description: Get all conversations for the authenticated user
Get messages in a conversation (member only)

parameters.description: Cursor: get messages before this message ID
parameters.name: before

post.description: Send a message to a conversation

get.description: Get notifications for the authenticated user
Get the number of unread notifications

put.description: Mark a single notification as read

get.description: Get posts with optional filters

parameters.description: Return only latest post per thread (true/false)
parameters.name: latest

get.description: Get a post by its ID
Get user profiles with optional filters

parameters.description: Filter by user ID (eq.uuid or in.(uuid,...))
parameters.name: id

get.description: Get a user profile by ID

post.description: Create a new post in a thread
Create a new thread in a board

get.description: Get the number of likes for a post
Get the number of likes for a thread
Search across users, boards, threads, and posts
Get threads with optional filters
Get a thread by its ID
Get the authenticated user's drops balance
Get a list of all currently online users
Get the online status of a specific user
